name: Proline Adult Cat Food Canned - Chicken Chunks in Gravy 400g
shortDescription: (4 pieces minimum order) Fully balanced all-natural wet cat food with chicken protein. Carefully formulated by a cat nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats.
description: Proline Adult Cat Food Canned - Chicken Chunks in Gravy , fully balanced all-natural cat food with chicken protein. Carefully formulated by a cat nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein ......................................................... 6.5% Fat..................................................................3.5% Crude Ash ........................................................ 2% Crude Cellulose (Fiber)....................................0.3% Moisture..............................................................82% INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal derivatives (4% chicken), cereals, minerals, vegetable by-products, sugar. MINERALS: Biotin, Taurine, Zinc, Manganese, Copper. VITAMINS: Vit. D3, Vit. E. These nutrients support: . Healthy skin and coat. . Strong immune and nervous systems. . Vital organ function and energy metabolism. Why Cat Parents Choose Proline Chicken Chunks: . High moisture content for hydration support. . Formulated by experts for complete adult cat nutrition. . Delicious gravy cats find irresistible. Feeding Guide For an average adult cat (4kg): feed approximately 2-3 cans daily , divided into 2 or more meals. Adjust according to activity level and age. Always ensure fresh water is available.
